---
title: "0_installPackages_loadLibraries"
author: "Pedro Beschoren da Costa"
date: "August 24, 2021"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
# 0_installPackages_loadLibraries

This scrip manages package installation and library loading.

We are using package renv (whch substitutes packrat) to manage the packages in our project. Essentially, we ahve a snapshot of our packages and theri versions on the file "renv.lock". this snapshot is taken with renv::snapshot() and re-loaded with renv::restore(). finally, all packages are locally installed in ".\renv\library\R-4.0\x86_64-w64-mingw32"

We can continue to work as normal, installing whatever packages when necessary. if they don't break the rest of the code, we can update the renv snapshot. if they do break the code, we can load the previous lockfile and restore the packages versions adn isntallations

as wallways, amke sure the changes are smooth in your local machine before commitng to the repository. even in case of tatal failiure, we can still restore previous versions due to git version control


## 0.1 install Packages
Packages used in the MeJA Piot experiment have been installed locally by Pedro. new packages will be isntalled during analysis. the chunk below let's you initialize renv, take snapshots, and restore previous package installations. we don't ahve to run this often so it is silenced. OBS: silencing is not a good way to manage the script behaviour.

```{r results=hide}



# install and load renv

# initialize renv on your R project 
# renv::init() # you only need to do this once. 

# save the state of the project library to the lockfile (called renv.lock)
# renv::snapshot() # we don't need to perform this every time

# evert to the previous state as encoded in the lockfile
# renv::restore() # we don't need to perform this every time

# in package downloading is problematic, try this:
# Sys.setenv(RENV_DOWNLOAD_FILE_METHOD = "libcurl")

```

## 0.1 load libraries
here we load all the libraries necessary over the entire analysis, sourcing it from an R script file. this list will have to be updated as we progress in our analysis.
```{r results=hide}

source("./src/Amplicon_sequencing/Functions/0_load_libraries.r")



```

## 0.2 packages in lockfile but not detected by renv:status
renv will find several packages if they are coded as library("package") or require("package") or package::function().These are screened  over all files in your working directory as an automated dependency discovery. Thus some automation of renv::status() and renv::restore() might fail, specially if a package is suggested or is in developmental stage.

The simple presence of this chunk, that does not need to run, allows renv to keep them in the lockfile even if they are not automatically detected at first
```{r}
#main packages
library("devtools")# needed to install some packages
library("BiocManager") # needed to install some packages
library("remotes")# needed to install some packages
library("ggplot2")
library("dplyr")
library("tibble") 
library("rbiom") #needed to load large 16S biom files
library("stringr")# to wrangle string vectors
library("Boruta") # for random forest feature selection
library("mlbench") # for random forest
library("caret") # for random forest
library("randomForest") # for random forest
library("tidyr")
library("vegan") # for several essential statistical tests
library("forcats")
library("ggrepel") # to avoid legends overlapping in your plot
library("ggpubr")
library("igraph") # calculates entowrk metrics and manipulates netowrk objects
library("metagMisc") #  lets you create lists of split phyloseq objects
library("pheatmap") # heatmaps for deseq2
library("agricolae")# includes some anova post-hoc options
library("minpack.lm") #lets you do som HSD tests output is a nice table
library("Hmisc") # for neutral models
library("spaa") # need to install Ecoutils
library("stats4")# for neutral models
library("car") #for levene test
library("metacoder") # plots heat trees
library("purrr") # has map() to select table elements
library("viridis") # prety colors
library("phyloseq") # essential to produce phyloseq objects with OUT metadata and taxa in a single place
library("microbiome") # has convinient data wrangling functions
library("decontam") # to make use of no-template blank DNA extractions
library("metagenomeSeq") # to normalize library sizes without rarefying them
library("DESeq2") # used for differential abundance analysis
library("WGCNA") # needed for eigen_correlation ()  allowing you to correlate metadata to network modules
library("pairwiseAdonis")
library("tyRa")  #need for neutral models
library("metagMisc")  #n lets you split a phyloseq object in a list
library("EcolUtils")   #pairwise adonis fucntion
library("MicEco")  #for venn diagrams on phylosseq  objects
library("SpiecEasi") # builds the sparse networks

#secondary packages
library("ANCOMBC")
library("AlgDesign")
library("BH")
library("BiocNeighbors")
library("BiocParallel")
library("BiocSingular")
library("Boruta")
library("DESeq2")
library("DelayedArray")
library("DelayedMatrixStats")
library("EcolUtils")
library("GA")
library("GenSA")
library("GenomicRanges")
library("MatrixGenerics")
library("MicEco")
library("ModelMetrics")
library("NADA")
library("PERFect")
library("R.cache")
library("R.methodsS3")
library("R.oo")
library("R.utils")
library("RcppArmadillo")
library("RcppHNSW")
library("RcppNumerical")
library("RcppParallel")
library("Rdpack")
library("Rtsne")
library("SQUAREM")
library("ScaledMatrix")
library("SingleCellExperiment")
library("SpiecEasi")
library("SummarizedExperiment")
library("VGAM")
library("WikidataQueryServiceR")
library("WikidataR")
library("WikipediR")
library("XML")
library("agricolae")
library("annotate")
library("apeglm")
library("assertthat")
library("bbmle")
library("bdsmatrix")
library("beachmat")
library("bluster")
library("bold")
library("brew")
library("bslib")
library("caret")
library("class")
library("classInt")
library("coda")
library("combinat")
library("commonmark")
library("conditionz")
library("conquer")
library("credentials")
library("crosstalk")
library("crul")
library("decontam")
library("devtools")
library("doSNOW")
library("dqrng")
library("e1071")
library("edgeR")
library("emdbook")
library("eulerr")
library("fastmatch")
library("fitdistrplus")
library("fontawesome")
library("formatR")
library("fs")
library("futile.logger")
library("futile.options")
library("future")
library("future.apply")
library("genefilter")
library("geneplotter")
library("gert")
library("ggfittext")
library("gh")
library("gitcreds")
library("globals")
library("gower")
library("hardhat")
library("httpcode")
library("httpuv")
library("huge")
library("indicspecies")
library("ini")
library("installr")
library("ipred")
library("irlba")
library("klaR")
library("labelled")
library("lambda.r")
library("later")
library("lava")
library("lazyeval")
library("listenv")
library("lubridate")
library("markdown")
library("metacoder")
library("metapod")
library("microbiome")
library("miniUI")
library("mlbench")
library("mnormt")
library("mvtnorm")
library("natserv")
library("pROC")
library("packrat")
library("pacman")
library("pairwiseAdonis")
library("parallelly")
library("pbapply")
library("phangorn")
library("pheatmap")
library("pkgbuild")
library("polyclip")
library("polylabelr")
library("prodlim")
library("progressr")
library("promises")
library("proxy")
library("psych")
library("pulsar")
library("quadprog")
library("questionr")
library("randomForest")
library("ranger")
library("rappdirs")
library("ratelimitr")
library("rbibutils")
library("rbiom")
library("rcmdcheck")
library("recipes")
library("remotes")
library("rentrez")
library("rex")
library("ritis")
library("rjson")
library("rncl")
library("rotl")
library("roxygen2")
library("rredlist")
library("rsvd")
library("rversions")
library("sass")
library("scran")
library("scuttle")
library("segmented")
library("seqinr")
library("sessioninfo")
library("shades")
library("shiny")
library("sitmo")
library("slam")
library("sn")
library("snow")
library("softImpute")
library("solrium")
library("sourcetools")
library("spaa")
library("sparseMatrixStats")
library("spatial")
library("statmod")
library("styler")
library("taxize")
library("textshape")
library("timeDate")
library("tmvnsim")
library("triebeard")
library("truncnorm")
library("urltools")
library("usethis")
library("uuid")
library("whisker")
library("wikitaxa")
library("worrms")
library("xml2")
library("xopen")
library("xtable")
library("zCompositions")
library("zinbwave")
library("zoo")


```

### Done! all libraries loaded.
